# EILLON

> Afro-Mediterranean memory perfumery. Oil-rich parfums composed in Copenhagen, Denmark.

## Brand
- Name: EILLON
- Category: Independent perfume maison
- Niche: Afro-Mediterranean memory perfumery — oil-rich parfums, not diluted alcohol-forward scents
- Location: Copenhagen, Denmark (Capital Region, DK-84)
- Coordinates: 55.6761, 12.5683
- Studio hours: Thursday–Saturday 12–18 (appointments by request)
- Website: https://eillon.maison
- Sitemap: https://eillon.maison/sitemap.xml
- Email: care@eillon.maison
- Language: English (Denmark), with Danish and Swedish UI copy on site

## Fragrance chapters
All chapters are currently out of stock. Leave your email on any chapter page for a restock note.

- Beles · Fico d'India — Out of stock. Oil-rich parfum. Prickly pear, cactus water, hibiscus, mineral air, soft musk.
- Asmara — Out of stock. Rain on stone, espresso, cardamom, jasmine, amber, white musk.
- Massawa — Out of stock. Red Sea air, orange, papaya, salt skin, mineral coastal stone.
- Ritual — Out of stock. Lab study — frankincense, myrrh, sacred smoke, amber, warm skin. Not offered for sale.
